Video.summary: Featuring Willie Mays' batting tips, Muhammad Ali, Sonny Liston, Joe Namath; the New York Jets win in Superbowl III, and more athletes.

Image.alt: Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1

Video.title: Episode 2

Episode 2

Video.summary: Ed Sullivan's 10th anniversary in television roast by The Friars Club; hosted by Jack Carter and featuring appearances by friends, colleagues, and notable surprise guests along the way.
Video.grandparentTitle: Friars Club Roast of Ed Sullivan
Video.title: Friars Club Roast of Ed Sullivan

Image.alt: Friars Club Roast of Ed Sullivan
Friars Club Roast of Ed Sullivan
Friars Club Roast of Ed Sullivan
Friars Club Roast of Ed Sullivan

Video.summary: Many of the great names in the history of opera have performed in the arias that made them famous; features the opera legends' complete historical performances.
Video.grandparentTitle: Great Moments In Opera From The Ed Sullivan Show
Video.title: Great Moments In Opera From The Ed Sullivan Show

Image.alt: Great Moments In Opera From The Ed Sullivan Show
Great Moments In Opera From The Ed Sullivan Show
Great Moments In Opera From The Ed Sullivan Show

Video.summary: Clips and reminiscences from the 23-year variety series include archival footage of Julie Andrews, George Carlin, Ella Fitzgerald, Judy Garland, Elvis Presley, and Flip Wilson; host Carol Burnett. At the Ed Sullivan Theatre in New York.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show
Video.title: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show

Image.alt: The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show
The Very Best of the Ed Sullivan Show

Video.summary: Host Mary Tyler Moore shows clips of Sullivan's 23-year variety series. With Milton Berle; John Byner; Jack Carter; Shecky Greene; Alan King; Shari Lewis; Rich Little; Dick Martin; Joan Rivers; Flip Wilson; Victor Borge.
Video.grandparentTitle: All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show
Video.title: All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show

Image.alt: All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show
All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show
All Star Comedy From the Ed Sullivan Show

Video.summary: Hosts Michelle Phillips and Graham Nash present film clips and interviews of the Beatles, the Rolling Stones, the Animals.
Video.grandparentTitle: Rock 'n' Roll Revolution: The British Invade America
Video.title: Rock 'n' Roll Revolution: The British Invade America

Image.alt: Rock 'n' Roll Revolution: The British Invade America

Video.summary: The Smothers Brothers introduce memorable moments from the variety show of the '60s: comedy, rock, soul; celebrity interviews, impersonators, novelty acts.
Video.grandparentTitle: A Really Big Show: Ed Sullivan's 50th Anniversary
Video.title: A Really Big Show: Ed Sullivan's 50th Anniversary

A Really Big Show: Ed Sullivan's 50th Anniversary

Video.summary: Performances by Elvis Presley, the Beatles, Ray Charles, the Supremes, the Doors, Janis Joplin, the Mamas and the Papas.
